name: Shoe Shiner
ability: Once per game, at night, choose a player: if good, swap characters with them.
firstNightReminder: The Shoe Shiner might choose a player. If necessary, show the *YOU ARE* token & their new character token & wake the chosen player & do the same. :reminder:
otherNightReminder: The Shoe Shiner might choose a player. If necessary, show the *YOU ARE* token & their new character token & wake the chosen player & do the same. :reminder:
